md.t:
医学博士, 总经理, 常务董事
[计] 宏数据, 磁盘, 维护设备, 信息数据, 彼此相关性
DOS内部命令:该命令用于在软盘或硬盘上建立新的子目录
md.d:
n a radioactive transuranic element synthesized by bombarding einsteinium with alpha particles (Md is the current symbol for mendelevium but Mv was formerly the symbol)
n a licensed medical practitioner
n a Mid-Atlantic state; one of the original 13 colonies
n a doctor's degree in medicine

mda.t:
单色显示适配卡
[计] 单色显示适配卡

mdbc.t: abbr. modified dispersive boundary condition 修正色散边界条件

mdbs.t: (mdb 的复数) abbr. 元数据库（Meta Datase）

mdc.t: abbr. maintenance data collection 维护数据收集; more developed country 更多发达国家

mdd.t: abbr. microgram per square decimeter per day 微克/分米/天（腐蚀速率单位）

mde.t: abbr. made 制造的; matrix difference equation 矩阵差分方程

mdes.t: [计]= MultiData Entry System,多数据输入系统

mdg.t: abbr. mobile dispersed genes 移动分散基因; muscular dysgenesis 肌发育不全

mdh.t: [医][=malate dehydrogenase(malic acid dehydrogenase)]苹果酸脱氢酶

mdi.t: [化] 二苯基亚甲基二异氰酸酯
mdi.d: n a Sunni organization formed in 1989 and based in Pakistan; opposes missionary groups from the United States; has Lashkar-e-Tayyiba as its armed wing

mdis.t: abbr. Manual Data Input System 人工数据输入系统

mdiv.t: abbr. 道学硕士；神学硕士（Master of Divinity）
mdiv.d: n. a master's degree in religion

mdj.t: abbr. Muscular Dystrophy Journal <肌萎缩症杂志>（美国肌萎缩症研究小组）

mdk.t: abbr. 多媒体开发工具包；孤胆枪手（科学幻想题材的游戏）

mdl.t: [计] 主数据库, 宏数据语言

mdm.t: abbr. 工程数据管理（Master Data Management）；维修诊断手册（Maintenance Diagnostic Manual）

mdma.t: abbr. 二亚甲基双氧苯丙胺（methylene dioxymetham-phetamine）；摇头丸, 快乐丸
mdma.d: n. a stimulant drug that is chemically related to mescaline and amphetamine and is used illicitly for its euphoric and hallucinogenic effects; it was formerly used in psychotherapy but in 1985 it was declared illegal in the United States

mdn.t: abbr. median 中部，中央的，中线

mdo.t: abbr. medium-density overload(ing) 中密度超载; monthly debit ordinary 每月的普通借方

mdp.t: abbr. minimal distending pressure 最小扩大压力; minimum-distance principle 最短距离着陆原则; multi-disc player 多盘播放器

mdq.t: abbr. Minimum Detectable Quantity 最小检测量

mdr.t: abbr. 日最低需要量（Minimum Daily Requirement）；存储数据寄存器（Memory Data Register）；多路数据记录器（Multichannel Data Recorder）

mdrc.t: abbr. maximum distance for radiological consequences 最大放射性影响距离

mdrs.t: abbr. Mattis dementia rating scale 马蒂痴呆等级评定量表; multimedia data retrieval system 多媒体数据检索系统; manpower data relay station 人力数据中继站; muscular disability rating scale 肌肉残疾等级评定量表

mdrtb.t: abbr. multidrug-resistant tubercle bacilli 耐多药结核杆菌

mds.d:
n a radioactive transuranic element synthesized by bombarding einsteinium with alpha particles (Md is the current symbol for mendelevium but Mv was formerly the symbol)
n a licensed medical practitioner
n a Mid-Atlantic state; one of the original 13 colonies
n a doctor's degree in medicine

mdse.t: abbr. message delivery service element 信息发布服务单元

mdt.t: abbr. 平均空闲时间（mean down time）；（美国）山区时区

mdts.t: [计]= Modular Data Transaction System,模块式数据事务系统

mdu.t: abbr. 信息译码器（Message Decode Unit）；管理数据单元（Management Data Unit）

mdx.t: abbr. multiplexer/demultiplexer 多路复接/分接器，复用/解复用器
